label: Job giver get food
description: Directs the pawn to find and eat food when sufficiently hungry.

minCategory.label: Min category
minCategory.description: Minimum hunger level at which the pawn begins looking for food.

maxLevelPercentage.label: Max level percentage
maxLevelPercentage.description: If the pawn's food level is above this fraction (0–1), do not seek food.

forceScanWholeMap.label: Force scan whole map
forceScanWholeMap.description: If true, food search is not restricted to nearby regions.
